metadata.name: 03_智能体工具协同流
metadata.description: 演示如何调用外部工具（如联网搜索）并将结果交由 LLM 处理

graph_json: {"elements": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "position": {"x": 100, "y": 150}, "data": {"config": {"inputVariables": ["search_query"]}}, "label": "开始"}, {"id": "node_search", "type": "tool_executor", "position": {"x": 350, "y": 150}, "data": {"config": {"inputs": [{"name": "search_query", "type": "string", "source": ["node_start", "search_query"]}], "toolCode": "serp_api_search", "argumentsJson": "{\"query\": \"{search_query}\"}", "outputVariable": "search_results"}}, "label": "联网搜索"}, {"id": "node_llm", "type": "llm", "position": {"x": 650, "y": 150}, "data": {"config": {"inputs": [{"name": "search_query", "type": "string", "source": ["node_start", "search_query"]}, {"name": "search_results", "type": "string", "source": ["node_search", "search_results"]}], "modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "promptTemplate": "问题：{search_query}\\n\\n搜索结果：{search_results}\\n\\n请根据搜索结果总结最终答案。", "outputFormat": "text", "outputVariable": "final_answer"}}, "label": "整理答案"}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "position": {"x": 950, "y": 150}, "data": {"config": {"inputs": [{"name": "final_answer", "type": "string", "source": ["node_llm", "final_answer"]}], "outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "answer", "type": "string", "value": "{final_answer}", "children": []}]}}, "label": "结束"}, {"id": "edge_node_start_node_search", "type": "default", "source": "node_start", "target": "node_search", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_search_node_llm", "type": "default", "source": "node_search", "target": "node_llm", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_llm_node_end", "type": "default", "source": "node_llm", "target": "node_end", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}], "nodes": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "name": "开始", "config": {"inputVariables": ["search_query"]}}, {"id": "node_search", "type": "tool_executor", "name": "联网搜索", "config": {"inputs": [{"name": "search_query", "type": "string", "source": ["node_start", "search_query"]}], "toolCode": "serp_api_search", "argumentsJson": "{\"query\": \"{search_query}\"}", "outputVariable": "search_results"}}, {"id": "node_llm", "type": "llm", "name": "整理答案", "config": {"inputs": [{"name": "search_query", "type": "string", "source": ["node_start", "search_query"]}, {"name": "search_results", "type": "string", "source": ["node_search", "search_results"]}], "modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "promptTemplate": "问题：{search_query}\\n\\n搜索结果：{search_results}\\n\\n请根据搜索结果总结最终答案。", "outputFormat": "text", "outputVariable": "final_answer"}}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "name": "结束", "config": {"inputs": [{"name": "final_answer", "type": "string", "source": ["node_llm", "final_answer"]}], "outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "answer", "type": "string", "value": "{final_answer}", "children": []}]}}], "edges": [{"source": "node_start", "target": "node_search", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_search", "target": "node_llm", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_llm", "target": "node_end", "type": "default", "condition": ""}]}
